ocr.text: In the UK HM Treasury report for FY2023, the tax revenue composition is detailed as follows: Direct Taxes comprise Income
Tax amounting to $150B, representing 40% with a rating of High; Indirect Taxes include Value Added Tax at $120B, 32% with
a Medium rating, followed by Excise Duty, Alcohol Tax at $10B (3%, Medium), and Tobacco Tax at $5B (1%, Low). Property
Taxes consist of Council Tax totaling $30B (8%, Medium) and Business Rates at $15B (4%, Medium). Other Taxes include
Capital Gains Tax at $25B (7%, Medium) and Inheritance Tax at $10B (2%, Low), culminating in Total Revenue of $375B
(100%, N/A) and a Growth Rate of 3.5%, with the Previous Year at $362B and a forecast of $400B.

In the Trade Balance Overview, exports from Germany amount to $120M, imports $100M, yielding a Net Balance of $20M and
Tariffs Collected of $15M, with Trade Volumes across quarters totaling $80M; France follows with exports at $110M, imports
at $90M, a Net Balance of $20M, Tariffs Collected of $12M, and Total FY2023 at $75M. Italy's exports of $95M and imports
